docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENNER, ROBERT PHILLIPS, PUROBI AS TO DEFENDANT MARKS, ANNA LUCY MARKS, MICHAEL DOES 1-X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENNER, ROBERT PHILLIPS, PUROBI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKS, ANNA LUCY MARKS, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1645 JUDAH STREET, LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTORNEY'S FEE INCURRED PURSUANT TO A NOTICED MOTION; AND COSTS INCURRED IN THE ENFORCEMENT OF THE STIPULATION OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED DOC)
